title: Nome and Anchorage offices reopening to public June 1, 2020
summary: Sitnasuak Native Corporation (SNC) will begin the process of reopening the Nome and Anchorage offices to the public on Monday, June 1, 2020 on a limited basis. SNC strongly urges Shareholders and customers to conduct their business by phone, email or online if possible. If a visit to a SNC office is...
